title: tovaria oligophylla
intro: Tovaria oligophylla, also known as the Tovaria or Tovaria plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Balsamaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The leaves and roots of the Tovaria oligophylla plant contain flavonoids and alkaloids, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and relief from respiratory issues. In herbal medicine, Tovaria oligophylla is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
